comics.alt: You should've seen the look on your face when you thought you'd gotten your mom killed!

comics.alt: SMBC is just propaganda for longterm relationships.

comics.alt: This is what I think about every argument that involves humans agreeing to not doing something with AI.

comics.title: Ant
comics.alt: And they both interpreted their success or failure as deserved rather than a consequence of macroeconomic forces and chance. The end.

comics.title: Nantucket
comics.alt: The Man from Madras, whose balls were of brass, is in fact a meditation on the need to find synthesis between humanity and technology in modern life.

comics.title: Prime
comics.alt: Unrelated, but according to Maynard 2019 there's an infinite number of primes that don't require the letter W.

comics.title: Battle
comics.alt: Still don't know why they kept asking their ghostly duplicates whether they liked that over and over.

comics.title: Fluid
comics.alt: I believe there are sexy people who are doctors, but there are no sexy doctors.

comics.title: Opportunity
comics.alt: Later he stops paying attention to you and you only learn through the news that the algorithm changed.

comics.title: Quest
comics.alt: You can actually do a lot of low-risk leveling up of the relationship just by using a bot to have your character run around stabbing rats all day.

comics.title: Warrantless
comics.alt: The bound and gagged stripper also gets weird after the first amendment goes away.

comics.title: Moral
comics.alt: Why are Adam Sandler movies not perceived as moral cataclysms?

comics.alt: Humans are good at zoos since we're already adapted to captivity.

comics.alt: The worst part is the movie goes on for weeks but never finishes.

comics.title: Grimm
comics.alt: I knew Grimm's fables were pretty dark, but some of them seem to have been written purposefully as a time capsule to frighten the future.

comics.title: Full Dive
comics.alt: In the real life version, you just get extremely emotional ads for Fritos.

comics.title: Up
comics.alt: Bet you none of these newfangled Ai art generators will do you an upskirt Pope.
